data.title: X Square Robot raises $140M in Series A++ funding from investors like ByteDance, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, X Square Robot, a leader in general purpose embodied AI, successfully closed its Series A++ funding round, securing approximately US$140 million (equivalent to RMB 1 billion). This funding round garnered significant interest from top-tier investors globally, notably ByteDance.

data.title: BlueVault launched by Democrats to attract crypto donors for 2026 elections, seeking a fundraising reset.
data.description: A recently launched platform is targeting Democratic campaigns to attract crypto donors in preparation for the 2026 mid-term elections.

data.title: US attack odds on Iran exceed 50% on Polymarket, with $13.7 million wagered. Tensions rising as Washington advises Americans to leave country immediately.
data.description: According to current betting trends on Polymarket, there is now a probability of over 50% for a U.S. military strike on Iran happening this month. This increase follows a recent advisory advising Americans to leave Iran immediately due to ongoing protests in the country. As of now, the odds of a U.S. strike on Iran by January 31 have surged to 54%, marking a 9 percentage point increase in the last 24 hours. Additionally, the likelihood of such military action taking place by January 23 has risen from 29% to 43%. Wagers totaling approximately $13.7 million have been placed on this particular bet. The outcome of the market will be determined as "Yes" if the U.S. carries out a drone, missile, or air strike on Iranian territory, including its embassies. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Blind yachtsman Mitsuhiro Iwamoto to attempt solo, non-stop trans-Pacific crossing in 2027 from San Diego to Japan.
data.description: In FUJISAWA, Japan, the "Blind Sailor Single-Handed Pacific Crossing Project 2027" is set to make history as Mitsuhiro Iwamoto, a blind Japanese yachtsman residing in San Diego, plans to undertake a solo and non-stop trans-Pacific crossing in the spring of 2027. Iwamoto, who is completely blind, will sail a 28-foot yacht alone in an attempt to navigate from San Diego on the U.S. West Coast to Amakusa, Kumamoto Prefecture, Japan without stopping at any ports. The daring endeavor will be a first of its kind, showcasing resilience and determination.

data.title: Sika announces preliminary 2025 sales of CHF 11.2 billion, exceeding expectations.
data.description: Sika has released initial sales figures for 2025, reporting CHF 11.2 billion in revenue. This announcement was made in compliance with Article 53 of the SIX Exchange Regulation Listing Rules.

data.title: iQOO 15 debuts Samsung 2K M14 LEAD™ OLED Display after two years of development, enhancing flagship visuals.
data.description: In Dongguan, China, on January 12, 2026, iQOO unveiled the Samsung 2K M14 LEAD™ OLED Display on its newest flagship model, the iQOO 15. This display is the result of over two years of collaboration between iQOO and Samsung. It introduces the innovative M14 light-emitting material and next-generation technology to enhance the viewing experience.
